nodes.title: Display Report Selector
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/reports page loads, display report type selector with options: Profit/Loss, Account Statement, Daily Summary, Trial Balance. Each option shows icon and description. User selects report type and date parameters.

nodes.title: Display Profit Loss Report
nodes.description: When user selects Profit/Loss report and clicks 'عرض', fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/profit-loss with date range. Display revenue, expenses, and net profit in formatted table. Shows empty state if no data.

nodes.title: Display Account Statement
nodes.description: When user selects Account Statement, picks account from dropdown, and clicks 'عرض', fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/account-statement/:accountId. Display transactions table with running balance. Shows opening and closing balance.

nodes.title: Display Trial Balance
nodes.description: When user selects Trial Balance and clicks 'عرض', fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/trial-balance. Display table with account name, code, debit balance, credit balance. Shows totals row at bottom verifying debits equal credits.
